creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Šmydke from comment #2)
> (In reply to Tijl Coosemans from comment #1)
>> I suspect you need to link with "-Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/gcc48".  The
>> lang/gcc ports need to be fixed such that gcc does this automatically.
> 
> This does not help. The very same error is produced.

Yeah, it should be "-Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/gcc48 -L/usr/local/lib/gcc48".
